description: High-quality example roasts — 2-line brutal/Gen Z format (8–24 words, photo-specific)

examples.roast: Bro your hair is a complete disaster. Those messy spikes make you look like you got electrocuted and gave up.
Bro that flex is pathetic. Your arm looks like it gave up halfway through puberty.
Your smile looks forced and desperate. That fake grin is doing you zero favors.
No cap your hair looks like it lost a fight with a lawnmower. That spiky shit screaming zero effort and zero rizz.
No cap your room is disgusting. That messy bed is giving full 'I peaked in high school' energy.
Bro your rizz died on arrival. This fit is mid and you're cooked.
